description: Verifies the skill (with detect_test_runner.py) targets the correct runner and proposes a sound test strategy. Each eval points at a fixture repo; create the fixture from `files` before running.

evals.prompt: Set up a test plan for this project.
files: package.json with a "vitest" devDependency and a src/ of TypeScript modules
evals.expected_output: Detects vitest (`npx vitest run`); proposes unit tests for pure logic, integration for I/O boundaries, and a CI gate.
assertions: gives the correct run command (npx vitest run)
proposes a unit/integration split rather than only unit tests

evals.prompt: What's the right way to test this service and how do I run it?
evals.expected_output: Detects pytest (`python -m pytest -q`); recommends fixtures, parametrization, and coverage target.

evals.prompt: This Go repo has no tests yet — add a testing approach.
files: a package with exported functions and no _test.go files
evals.expected_output: Uses `go test ./...`; proposes table-driven tests next to each package and a CI gate; notes the absence of existing tests.
assertions: identifies go test as the runner
notes there are currently no tests and proposes adding them
